\tzpentry{ID5432}{Omegagyro Gyromagnetic Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5432 introduces Omegagyro Gyromagnetic Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g\nu[\mathrm{omegagyro}] = \nu + h(rotation) \end{equation}
